_description: Gold standard expected output for: FUSRAP Data Management Services — U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

expected.title: FUSRAP Data Management Services
expected.summary: The U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Philadelphia District seeks a contractor to provide data processing, hosting, management, and related services in support of ongoing environmental remediation at the former DuPont Chambers Works FUSRAP site. The IDIQ contract covers data management planning, database hosting, digitization of historical records, AI-enhanced search, CMMC compliance, aerial surveying, and 2D/3D data visualization over a five-year period.

_field_sources.title: Derived from document header: 'Scope for Data Management Services' + FUSRAP context
